title: forward.dynatrace Ingest Status
description: Dashboard construction template for publish-safe Forward ingest status events.

queries.title: Latest Forward ingest runs
queries.purpose: Show recent package IDs, provenance, import state, signature state, planned checks, and reconciliation counts.

queries.title: Needs Forward review
queries.purpose: Surface failed, drifted, changed, stale, or unsigned runs that need operator action.

operationalNotes: Use this as a dashboard build template when importing into a tenant-specific Dynatrace dashboard.
Do not add Forward credentials, check names, hostnames, dependency rows, or Forward API response bodies to status events.
Treat this dashboard as observability only; Forward write approval remains in the Forward-controlled workflow.
